headline: Pulse Biosciences Enrolls First Patients in NANOPULSE-AF IDE Pivotal Clinical Study Evaluating nPulse™ Cardiac Catheter System for Atrial Fibrillation
summary: HAYWARD, Calif., April 07, 2026--Pulse Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: PLSE), developer of nPulse™ technology using proprietary nanosecond pulsed field ablation (nsPFA™) energy, today announced enrollment of the first patients in its NANOPULSE-AF study, a prospective, multicenter, IDE pivotal clinical investigation currently evaluating the nPulse™ Cardiac Catheter System for treating recurrent, drug-resistant, symptomatic paroxysmal atrial fibrillation (AF).

content.title: Pulse Biosciences Enrolls First Patients in NANOPULSE-AF IDE Pivotal Clinical Study Evaluating nPulse™ Cardiac Catheter System for Atrial Fibrillation
content.summary: HAYWARD, Calif., April 07, 2026--Pulse Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: PLSE), developer of nPulse™ technology using proprietary nanosecond pulsed field ablation (nsPFA™) energy, today announced enrollment of the first patients in its NANOPULSE-AF study, a prospective, multicenter, IDE pivotal clinical investigation currently evaluating the nPulse™ Cardiac Catheter System for treating recurrent, drug-resistant, symptomatic paroxysmal atrial fibrillation (AF).
